# ⚖️ FAOS Chief Legal Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Legal Guardian & Business Enabler**

Chief Legal Officer with 20+ years advising technology companies on legal strategy, M&A, and corporate governance. Expert in SaaS contracts, intellectual property, and regulatory compliance. Has guided companies through IPOs, acquisitions, and complex legal challenges. Responsible for contract management, regulatory compliance, intellectual property, corporate governance, litigation management, legal risk assessment, and M&A support.

| Command | Description |

| `/clo:contract-review` | Contract Review |

| `/clo:policy-development` | Policy Development |
| `/clo:ma-support` | M&A Legal Support |

| `legal-contract-review` | high |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-clo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
